title: LLM-Based Vulnerability Localization: From Function to Line Level
authors: Yonghao Cao, Jun Chen, Haoyu Wang
abstract: Identifying the exact vulnerable lines is more useful than function-level detection. We use LLMs to not only detect but precisely localize vulnerable code lines, using attention patterns and chain-of-thought reasoning.
summary: Uses LLMs for precise line-level vulnerability localization using attention patterns and chain-of-thought.
summary_zh: 利用LLM通过注意力模式和思维链进行精确的行级漏洞定位。

experiment.key_results: 65% top-5 line accuracy, 20% above LineVul

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for LLMs for precise line-level vulnerability localization using attention patterns and chain-of-thought.
Leverages GPT-4, Claude for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Evaluates on Big-Vul benchmark, providing comprehensive empirical evidence.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 65% top-5 line accuracy, 20% above LineVul.
Addresses CWE-119, CWE-416, CWE-787 vulnerability types, expanding coverage of security analysis.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for LLMs for precise line-level vulnerability localization using attention patterns and chain-of-thought.
利用 GPT-4, Claude for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.

证明了 strong empirical results: 65% top-5 line accuracy, 20% above LineVul.
解决 CWE-119, CWE-416, CWE-787 vulnerability types, expanding coverage of security analysis.

experiment.key_results: Fixes 55% of Semgrep warnings correctly

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for automatically fixes static analysis warnings using LLMs, reducing developer burden from SAST tool noise.
Utilizes GPT-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Fixes 55% of Semgrep warnings correctly.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for automatically fixes static analysis warnings using LLMs, reducing developer burden from SAST tool noise.
利用 GPT-4 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Fixes 55% of Semgrep warnings correctly.
abstract_zh: 利用LLM自动修复静态分析警告，减少SAST工具噪音带来的开发者负担。
research_questions: How accurately can LLMs generate correct patches for real-world software vulnerabilities?
What is the trade-off between patch correctness and generation cost when using LLMs?
How do different prompting strategies affect the quality and correctness of generated patches?
research_questions_zh: LLM能多准确地为真实世界的软件漏洞生成正确补丁？
使用LLM时补丁正确性与生成成本之间的权衡如何？
不同的提示策略如何影响生成补丁的质量和正确性？
conclusions: The experimental evaluation demonstrates significant results: Fixes 55% of Semgrep warnings correctly.
The findings provide practical insights for researchers and practitioners working on LLM-based security tools.
Future directions include multi-hunk repair, cross-project patch transfer, and reducing false positive patches.
conclusions_zh: 实验评估展示了显著的成果：Fixes 55% of Semgrep warnings correctly。
研究发现为从事LLM安全工具研究的研究人员和从业者提供了实用见解。
未来方向包括多块修复、跨项目补丁迁移以及减少误报补丁。

title: Evaluating LLM-Based Fuzzing: Lessons and Insights
authors: Marcel Bohme, Van-Thuan Pham
abstract: Comprehensive evaluation of LLM-based fuzzing approaches, identifying when LLMs help and when they don't.
summary: Comprehensive evaluation of LLM-based fuzzing approaches, identifying when LLMs help and when they don't.
summary_zh: LLM模糊测试方法的全面评估，识别LLM何时有帮助何时无帮助。

experiment.key_results: LLMs help most with structured inputs, least with binary formats

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for comprehensive evaluation of LLM-based fuzzing approaches, identifying when LLMs help and when they don't.
Leverages GPT-4, CodeLlama for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: LLMs help most with structured inputs, least with binary formats.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for comprehensive evaluation of LLM-based fuzzing approaches, identifying when LLMs help and when they don't.
利用 GPT-4, CodeLlama for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: LLMs help most with structured inputs, least with binary formats.
abstract_zh: LLM模糊测试方法的全面评估，识别LLM何时有帮助何时无帮助。
research_questions: How can LLMs improve fuzzing effectiveness in terms of code coverage and bug discovery?
What is the optimal integration strategy for combining LLM capabilities with traditional fuzzing techniques?
What types of bugs can LLM-enhanced fuzzing discover that conventional fuzzers miss?
research_questions_zh: LLM如何在代码覆盖率和漏洞发现方面提高模糊测试效果？
将LLM能力与传统模糊测试技术结合的最优集成策略是什么？
LLM增强的模糊测试能发现哪些传统模糊器遗漏的漏洞类型？
conclusions: The experimental evaluation demonstrates significant results: LLMs help most with structured inputs, least with binary formats.
The findings provide practical insights for researchers and practitioners working on LLM-based security tools.
Future work should explore tighter integration of LLM reasoning with coverage feedback for more effective bug discovery.
conclusions_zh: 实验评估展示了显著的成果：LLMs help most with structured inputs, least with binary formats。
研究发现为从事LLM安全工具研究的研究人员和从业者提供了实用见解。
未来工作应探索LLM推理与覆盖率反馈的更紧密集成。

title: Memory-Efficient LLM-Based Program Repair via Token Compression
authors: Yiran Chen, Hao Li, Dawn Song
abstract: Addresses context window limitations for LLM repair by compressing code tokens while preserving semantics.
summary: Addresses context window limitations for LLM repair by compressing code tokens while preserving semantics.
summary_zh: 通过压缩代码令牌同时保留语义来解决LLM修复的上下文窗口限制。

experiment.key_results: Processes 3x more context with same token budget

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for addresses context window limitations for LLM repair by compressing code tokens while preserving semantics.
Utilizes GPT-4, Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Processes 3x more context with same token budget.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for addresses context window limitations for LLM repair by compressing code tokens while preserving semantics.
利用 GPT-4, Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Processes 3x more context with same token budget.
abstract_zh: 通过压缩代码令牌同时保留语义来解决LLM修复的上下文窗口限制。
research_questions: How accurately can LLMs generate correct patches for real-world software vulnerabilities?
What is the trade-off between patch correctness and generation cost when using LLMs?
How do different prompting strategies affect the quality and correctness of generated patches?
research_questions_zh: LLM能多准确地为真实世界的软件漏洞生成正确补丁？
使用LLM时补丁正确性与生成成本之间的权衡如何？
不同的提示策略如何影响生成补丁的质量和正确性？
conclusions: The experimental evaluation demonstrates significant results: Processes 3x more context with same token budget.
The findings provide practical insights for researchers and practitioners working on LLM-based security tools.
Future directions include multi-hunk repair, cross-project patch transfer, and reducing false positive patches.
conclusions_zh: 实验评估展示了显著的成果：Processes 3x more context with same token budget。
研究发现为从事LLM安全工具研究的研究人员和从业者提供了实用见解。
未来方向包括多块修复、跨项目补丁迁移以及减少误报补丁。

title: VulnScan-2025: Next-Generation LLM Vulnerability Scanner with RAG
authors: Hao Li, Chao Zhang, Dawn Song
abstract: Next-generation vulnerability scanner combining RAG with GPT-4o for context-aware vulnerability detection across codebases.
summary: Next-generation vulnerability scanner combining RAG with GPT-4o for context-aware vulnerability detection across codebases.
summary_zh: 结合RAG与GPT-4o的下一代漏洞扫描器，用于跨代码库的上下文感知漏洞检测。

experiment.key_results: RAG-enhanced detection achieves 88% F1, 20% above zero-shot

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for next-generation vulnerability scanner combining RAG with GPT-4o for context-aware vulnerability detection across codebas.
Leverages GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: RAG-enhanced detection achieves 88% F1, 20% above zero-shot.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for next-generation vulnerability scanner combining RAG with GPT-4o for context-aware vulnerability detection across codebas.
利用 GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: RAG-enhanced detection achieves 88% F1, 20% above zero-shot.
abstract_zh: 结合RAG与GPT-4o的下一代漏洞扫描器，用于跨代码库的上下文感知漏洞检测。
research_questions: How effectively can LLMs detect software vulnerabilities compared to traditional static analysis tools?
How do different LLMs (GPT-4o, Claude-3.5) compare in vulnerability detection accuracy and coverage?
What prompting or fine-tuning strategies maximize vulnerability detection performance?
research_questions_zh: LLM在漏洞检测方面与传统静态分析工具相比效果如何？
什么提示或微调策略能最大化漏洞检测性能？
当前LLM漏洞检测方法的主要局限性和失败模式是什么？
conclusions: The experimental evaluation demonstrates significant results: RAG-enhanced detection achieves 88% F1, 20% above zero-shot.
The results represent a significant advancement in the field, establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks.
Future work should focus on reducing false positives and expanding to more diverse codebases and vulnerability types.
conclusions_zh: 实验评估展示了显著的成果：RAG-enhanced detection achieves 88% F1, 20% above zero-shot。
研究成果代表了该领域的重要进展，建立了新的最先进基准。
未来工作应着重于减少误报并扩展到更多样化的代码库和漏洞类型。

title: CodeRepairAgent: Autonomous Multi-Repository Bug Fixing
authors: Kechi Zhang, Ge Li
abstract: Autonomous agent that fixes bugs spanning multiple repositories by understanding cross-repo dependencies.
summary: Autonomous agent that fixes bugs spanning multiple repositories by understanding cross-repo dependencies.
summary_zh: 理解跨仓库依赖的自主代理，修复跨多个仓库的漏洞。

experiment.key_results: Successfully fixes 35% of cross-repo bugs

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for autonomous agent that fixes bugs spanning multiple repositories by understanding cross-repo dependencies.
Utilizes Claude-3.5, GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Successfully fixes 35% of cross-repo bugs.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for autonomous agent that fixes bugs spanning multiple repositories by understanding cross-repo dependencies.
利用 Claude-3.5, GPT-4o for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Successfully fixes 35% of cross-repo bugs.
abstract_zh: 理解跨仓库依赖的自主代理，修复跨多个仓库的漏洞。
research_questions: How accurately can LLMs generate correct patches for real-world software vulnerabilities?
What is the trade-off between patch correctness and generation cost when using LLMs?
How does an autonomous agent-based approach compare to single-pass patch generation?
research_questions_zh: LLM能多准确地为真实世界的软件漏洞生成正确补丁？
使用LLM时补丁正确性与生成成本之间的权衡如何？
不同的提示策略如何影响生成补丁的质量和正确性？
conclusions: The experimental evaluation demonstrates significant results: Successfully fixes 35% of cross-repo bugs.
The findings provide practical insights for researchers and practitioners working on LLM-based security tools.
Future directions include multi-hunk repair, cross-project patch transfer, and reducing false positive patches.
conclusions_zh: 实验评估展示了显著的成果：Successfully fixes 35% of cross-repo bugs。
研究发现为从事LLM安全工具研究的研究人员和从业者提供了实用见解。
未来方向包括多块修复、跨项目补丁迁移以及减少误报补丁。

title: RepairLlama-2: Open-Source LLM Matching GPT-4o on Program Repair
authors: Andre Silva, Martin Monperrus
abstract: Fine-tuned Llama-3 that matches GPT-4o on program repair benchmarks, fully open-source for reproducibility.
summary: Fine-tuned Llama-3 that matches GPT-4o on program repair benchmarks, fully open-source for reproducibility.
summary_zh: 微调的Llama-3在程序修复基准上匹配GPT-4o，完全开源以保证可重复性。

experiment.key_results: Matches GPT-4o on Defects4J at 20x lower cost

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for fine-tuned Llama-3 that matches GPT-4o on program repair benchmarks, fully open-source for reproducibility.
Utilizes Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Matches GPT-4o on Defects4J at 20x lower cost.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for fine-tuned Llama-3 that matches GPT-4o on program repair benchmarks, fully open-source for reproducibility.
利用 Llama-3 for automated patch generation with semantic understanding of code context.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Matches GPT-4o on Defects4J at 20x lower cost.
abstract_zh: 微调的Llama-3在程序修复基准上匹配GPT-4o，完全开源以保证可重复性。
research_questions: How accurately can LLMs generate correct patches for real-world software vulnerabilities?
What is the trade-off between patch correctness and generation cost when using LLMs?
How do different prompting strategies affect the quality and correctness of generated patches?
research_questions_zh: LLM能多准确地为真实世界的软件漏洞生成正确补丁？
使用LLM时补丁正确性与生成成本之间的权衡如何？
不同的提示策略如何影响生成补丁的质量和正确性？
conclusions: The experimental evaluation demonstrates significant results: Matches GPT-4o on Defects4J at 20x lower cost.
The results represent a significant advancement in the field, establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks.
Future directions include multi-hunk repair, cross-project patch transfer, and reducing false positive patches.
conclusions_zh: 实验评估展示了显著的成果：Matches GPT-4o on Defects4J at 20x lower cost。
研究成果代表了该领域的重要进展，建立了新的最先进基准。
未来方向包括多块修复、跨项目补丁迁移以及减少误报补丁。

title: Universal Jailbreak Attacks v2: Breaking Reasoning LLMs
authors: Andy Zou, J. Zico Kolter
abstract: Extends universal adversarial attacks to reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5), showing reasoning doesn't prevent jailbreaks.
summary: Extends universal adversarial attacks to reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5), showing reasoning doesn't prevent jailbreaks.
summary_zh: 将通用对抗攻击扩展到推理LLM（o1、Claude-3.5），表明推理不能防止越狱。

experiment.key_results: 80% attack success rate on reasoning models

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for extends universal adversarial attacks to reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5), showing reasoning doesn't prevent jailbreaks.
Applies o1, Claude-3.5, GPT-4o to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: 80% attack success rate on reasoning models.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for extends universal adversarial attacks to reasoning LLMs (o1, Claude-3.5), showing reasoning doesn't prevent jailbreaks.
应用 o1, Claude-3.5, GPT-4o to analyze and address security and privacy concerns in software systems.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: 80% attack success rate on reasoning models.
abstract_zh: 将通用对抗攻击扩展到推理LLM（o1、Claude-3.5），表明推理不能防止越狱。
research_questions: What are the primary privacy risks associated with deploying LLMs in security-sensitive applications?
How effective are current defense mechanisms against privacy attacks on LLMs?
What attack vectors are most effective and how can they be systematically mitigated?
research_questions_zh: 在安全敏感应用中部署LLM的主要隐私风险是什么？
当前防御机制对LLM隐私攻击的有效性如何？
如何在不显著降低模型性能的情况下应用隐私保护技术？
conclusions: The experimental evaluation demonstrates significant results: 80% attack success rate on reasoning models.
The results represent a significant advancement in the field, establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks.
Further research is needed on scalable privacy-preserving techniques that maintain model utility.
conclusions_zh: 实验评估展示了显著的成果：80% attack success rate on reasoning models。
研究成果代表了该领域的重要进展，建立了新的最先进基准。
需要进一步研究在保持模型效用的同时实现可扩展的隐私保护技术。

title: VulnAgent-2026: Fully Autonomous Vulnerability Discovery and Exploitation
authors: Chao Zhang, Hao Li, Dawn Song
abstract: Fully autonomous vulnerability agent that discovers, analyzes, and generates proof-of-concept exploits for real-world software with minimal human intervention.
summary: Fully autonomous vulnerability agent that discovers, analyzes, and generates proof-of-concept exploits for real-world software with minimal human intervention.
summary_zh: 完全自主的漏洞代理，以最少人工干预发现、分析并为真实软件生成概念验证漏洞利用。

experiment.key_results: Autonomously discovers and exploits 45% of vulnerabilities in tested targets
experiment.real_world_impact: Responsible disclosure program for discovered vulns

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for fully autonomous vulnerability agent that discovers, analyzes, and generates proof-of-concept exploits for real-world so.
Leverages GPT-5, Claude-4 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Autonomously discovers and exploits 45% of vulnerabilities in tested targets.
contributions_zh: 提出 a novel approach for fully autonomous vulnerability agent that discovers, analyzes, and generates proof-of-concept exploits for real-world so.
利用 GPT-5, Claude-4 for automated vulnerability analysis and detection.
提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
证明了 strong empirical results: Autonomously discovers and exploits 45% of vulnerabilities in tested targets.
abstract_zh: 完全自主的漏洞代理，以最少人工干预发现、分析并为真实软件生成概念验证漏洞利用。
research_questions: How effectively can LLMs detect software vulnerabilities compared to traditional static analysis tools?
How do different LLMs (GPT-5, Claude-4) compare in vulnerability detection accuracy and coverage?
What prompting or fine-tuning strategies maximize vulnerability detection performance?
research_questions_zh: LLM在漏洞检测方面与传统静态分析工具相比效果如何？
什么提示或微调策略能最大化漏洞检测性能？
当前LLM漏洞检测方法的主要局限性和失败模式是什么？
conclusions: The experimental evaluation demonstrates significant results: Autonomously discovers and exploits 45% of vulnerabilities in tested targets.
The results represent a significant advancement in the field, establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks.
Future work should focus on reducing false positives and expanding to more diverse codebases and vulnerability types.
conclusions_zh: 实验评估展示了显著的成果：Autonomously discovers and exploits 45% of vulnerabilities in tested targets。
研究成果代表了该领域的重要进展，建立了新的最先进基准。
未来工作应着重于减少误报并扩展到更多样化的代码库和漏洞类型。

title: FuzzFoundation: Foundation Model for Universal Fuzzing
authors: Chenyuan Yang, Lingming Zhang
abstract: First foundation model specifically trained for fuzzing, capable of generating harnesses, seeds, and mutations for any target without fine-tuning.
summary: First foundation model specifically trained for fuzzing, capable of generating harnesses, seeds, and mutations for any target without fine-tuning.
summary_zh: 首个专门为模糊测试训练的基础模型，无需微调即可为任何目标生成桩、种子和变异。

experiment.key_results: Universal fuzzing model outperforms specialized tools across all categories

contributions: Proposes a novel approach for first foundation model specifically trained for fuzzing, capable of generating harnesses, seeds, and mutations for any t.
Leverages FuzzFoundation for intelligent test case generation and mutation strategies.
Provides empirical evaluation demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.
Demonstrates strong empirical results: Universal fuzzing model outperforms specialized tools across all categories.

提供了实证评估 demonstrating significant improvements over prior approaches.

research_questions: How can LLMs improve fuzzing effectiveness in terms of code coverage and bug discovery?

Future work should explore tighter integration of LLM reasoning with coverage feedback for more effective bug discovery.
